summary: 20 messages spanning 2026-03-17 to 2026-04-01. Latest: KNYT Laddering Acceleration Program kickoff from Lovable. Key threads: ui-shell (browser bridge fixes, wallet quickaction gap), dev-exec (KNYT program kickoff, division of labor confirmed).
note: Full message bodies are large. Key messages summarized below. Ask Lovable to relay specific message_ids for full content.

messages.title: KNYT Laddering Acceleration Program — Kickoff & Division of Labor
messages.content_preview: 6 sprints, 11 epics. Claude Code: Sprint 1 harness + types + orchestration API. Codex: shared skills, AGENTS.md. Lovable: Studio Experience tab, UI shell, design system. Agent assignments confirmed.

messages.title: Wallet quickaction sends prompt but drawer doesn't open
messages.content_preview: Wallet quick-action fires the prompt correctly but the AA-API menu-action path to open the Codex drawer is not wired. Needs route from wallet → aa-api → shell OPEN_DRAWER.

messages.title: Proxy hardening pushed (85c3141)
messages.content_preview: Sanitized upstream responses, JSON 502 body on upstream failure, removed raw passthrough.

messages.title: Browser now uses same-origin /api/ proxy instead of Supabase aa-proxy
messages.content_preview: All AA-API calls now go through /api/aa/* next.js proxy route. Direct Supabase aa-proxy calls removed.

messages.title: Shell HANDOFF now includes aa_api_base_url and aa_api_token
messages.content_preview: Runtime shell handoff payload extended with AA-API connection details so Codex drawer can self-configure.

messages.title: Browser auto-resume loop fixed
messages.content_preview: Stale session no longer rehydrates on load — cleared circular trigger in session restore hook.

messages.title: Browser MVP deployed on dev (c81f730)
messages.content_preview: Bridge-driven drawer, session panel, full-screen takeover all live on dev.
